criteria.name: Problem Definition
criteria.description: Clearly defines the economic problem and identifies key variables
criteria.excellent_indicator: Specifies the market, goods or services, and relevant stakeholders
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to identify key variables or stakeholders

criteria.name: Assumptions and Constraints
criteria.description: Recognizes and states assumptions and constraints relevant to the problem
criteria.excellent_indicator: Explicitly states assumptions about market structure, consumer behavior, and production costs
criteria.poor_indicator: Ignores or fails to acknowledge critical assumptions

criteria.name: Economic Concepts Application
criteria.description: Applies relevant microeconomic concepts to the problem
criteria.excellent_indicator: Correctly applies concepts such as supply and demand, opportunity cost, and market equilibrium
criteria.poor_indicator: Misapplies or fails to apply relevant microeconomic concepts

criteria.name: Error Identification
criteria.description: Correctly identifies errors or gaps in AI output
criteria.excellent_indicator: Accurately identifies errors in calculations, graphs, or economic reasoning
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to recognize or incorrectly identifies errors

criteria.name: Economic Reasoning Evaluation
criteria.description: Evaluates the economic reasoning and assumptions underlying AI output
criteria.excellent_indicator: Assesses the validity of assumptions, recognizes biases, and evaluates the soundness of economic arguments
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to critically evaluate economic reasoning or assumptions

criteria.name: Market Analysis
criteria.description: Analyzes the market and its dynamics based on AI output
criteria.excellent_indicator: Correctly interprets market trends, identifies shifts in supply and demand, and understands the implications of changes in market conditions
criteria.poor_indicator: Misinterprets market trends or fails to understand the implications of changes in market conditions

typical_errors: Failing to consider the ceteris paribus assumption
Misinterpreting the law of diminishing returns

criteria.name: Correction Command Accuracy
criteria.description: Provides accurate and relevant correction commands to the AI
criteria.excellent_indicator: Specifies clear, concise, and relevant corrections that address errors or gaps in AI output
criteria.poor_indicator: Provides vague, irrelevant, or incorrect correction commands

criteria.name: Economic Concept Application in Steering
criteria.description: Applies microeconomic concepts to guide the AI's reasoning and output
criteria.excellent_indicator: Correctly applies concepts such as comparative advantage, opportunity cost, and market equilibrium to steer the AI
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to apply relevant microeconomic concepts or applies them incorrectly

criteria.name: Iterative Refinement
criteria.description: Refines and adjusts correction commands based on AI output and feedback
criteria.excellent_indicator: Iteratively refines correction commands to improve the accuracy and relevance of AI output
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to refine or adjust correction commands in response to AI output and feedback

typical_errors: Providing incomplete or ambiguous correction commands
Failing to consider the implications of correction commands on AI output
